Forging Hammer  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL

Send a correction
Post Comment
No longer sold?
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2017 at 4:03 AM Rating: Good
Woofie
Sage
90 posts
Trying to do the Iksar Necromancer 3rd cap quest, and I couldn't find it. Then someone pointed out the "Show only items my class can use" option. Oh look, there's my forging hammer.
Cheers to anyone else trying to do this quest, keep an eye on that stupid toggle!

Edited, Aug 24th 2017 6:11am by Woofie
▲ Page top
No longer sold
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2014 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1714954568226
67 posts
Just in case anyone is doing a quest that involves this (Necromancer skullcap 3rd rank), or a combine that involves this, it is no longer sold. Or at least the vendors i checked don't sell it. You have to either kill a skeletal worker(The Overthere) or possibly the dwarven smith(Crushbone). I am not sure on the smith, but i did just kill the worker and looted it, was quicker to get to.

Targar - 92 - Shaman - CT/Fennin ------ Dekro - 30 - Necromancer - CT/Fennin.

3-1-2014
▲ Page top
No longer sold? Forging Hammer
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2016 at 5:03 AM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Danknugzz wrote:
Just in case anyone is doing a quest that involves this (Necromancer skullcap 3rd rank), or a combine that involves this, it is no longer sold. Or at least the vendors i checked don't sell it. You have to either kill a skeletal worker(The Overthere) or possibly the dwarven smith(Crushbone). I am not sure on the smith, but i did just kill the worker and looted it, was quicker to get to.

Targar - 92 - Shaman - CT/Fennin ------ Dekro - 30 - Necromancer - CT/Fennin.

3-1-2014


Can anyone confirm or refute this information of "Forging Hammers no longer being sold by vendors"? [Doesn't sound right, but then they have done odd things at times]

We could also use a modern pic of this with the current UI.
▲ Page top
No longer sold? Forging Hammer
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2016 at 10:09 AM Rating: Good
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
snailish wrote:
Can anyone confirm or refute this information of "Forging Hammers no longer being sold by vendors"? [Doesn't sound right, but then they have done odd things at times]

They're still being sold by 4 vendors in PoK on the Antonius Bayle server, Also sold by 2 vendors in Shar Vahl, so definitely still available in cities. Danknugzz, what vendors did you check ?

I uploaded a new screenshot.

Edited, Sep 12th 2016 6:16pm by Drewinette

Klock Toren (Smithing Supplies) also sells forging hammers. Her loc is pos195, neg301, pos2

#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 6:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) If ya'll could I am looking at starting on a new server.. what would you say the least crowded server.. maybe one with more newbies?
Hammers
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 5:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758476986
Scholar
62 posts
I recieved one of these as a result of the Duster Models quest in Ak'anon - I have not yet verified, but have read in several places that when placed in a Forge with a gem or bone chips, both ingredients will disappear, leaving only powdered ingredient. See the Bone Granite Powder quest. On this note, perhaps one could create the Diamond Dust needed for the tinkered Gemcutter.

These are also available from Weaponsmith Grug in East Cabilis.

Markoff Chaney
Gnecro of the 30th Death
▲ Page top

diamond dust is actually a drop..ive got it on several occasions in numerous zones
